How RewardLoop works

Four steps. No receipts, no chasing payouts - cashback lands directly in your wallet.

01

Create your account

Pick a plan that fits how often you shop. Start free, upgrade anytime.

02

Find your store

Browse 1,000+ partners across fashion, travel, home, tech and more.

03

Shop as normal

Click through, complete your order - we track cashback automatically.

04

Earn cash + entries

Cashback hits your wallet. Every order also enters the monthly draw.
